name: Churu Dog Treats - Chicken with Vegetable Recipe 4 Tubes
description: Delight your dog with the rich taste and creamy texture of INABA Churu Chicken Recipe with Vegetables Lickable Dog Treats . Made with high-quality, farm-raised chicken and wholesome vegetables, these smooth purée treats are designed to provide a healthy, interactive, and hydrating snack for dogs of all life stages. Each convenient tube contains 91% moisture , helping support daily hydration especially beneficial during walks, playtime, or warm weather. With only around 6 calories per tube , Churu is a guilt-free treat that supports healthy weight management while still delivering irresistible flavor. INABA Churu Dog Treats are grain-free and free from preservatives, artificial colors, and carrageenan , ensuring a clean, wholesome reward you can trust. Their versatile format allows them to be hand-fed for bonding moments, served in a bowl, used as a food topper, or cleverly used to administer medication with ease. Whether used for training, rewarding good behavior, or simply sharing a moment of joy, INABA Churu Chicken with Vegetables offers a nutritious and delicious experience your dog will love. Key Benefits Made with farm-raised chicken and vegetables 91% moisture to support hydration Low-calorie treat (approx. 6 kcal per tube) Grain-free and additive-free (no preservatives, artificial colors, or carrageenan) Ideal for pill administration, training, or food topping Suitable for dogs of all life stages Feeding & Usage Feed directly from the tube for interactive bonding Pour into a bowl or use as a topper for dry or wet food Use to conceal medication Always provide fresh drinking water Product Details Texture: Smooth, creamy purée Weight: 0.014 kg (14 g per tube) Life Stage: All life stages
